name: softrotate
description: Reference-parity: softRotate = radial-falloff Rotate (xfrm.softRotate). The reference applies R(w*theta) (angle scaled by per-vertex weight, radius preserved). Cases cross multiple angles and a smooth falloff shape. Empty reset; rotation about Z.
source: Frozen reference capture (radial falloff, real-GL session; captured from a reference session via the private capture tooling).

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:2 segmentsY:2 segmentsZ:2 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
